scripts.build: bun run build:api-stack && bun run --filter @vibe-tavern/web build
scripts.build:api-stack: bun run --filter @vibe-tavern/domain build && bun run --filter @vibe-tavern/api-contracts build && bun run --filter @vibe-tavern/prompt-pipeline build && bun run --filter @vibe-tavern/db build && bun run --filter @vibe-tavern/import-export build && bun run --filter @vibe-tavern/api build
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test
